fields.why: Flat damage bonuses are a stable damage rider field.

log.why: Flat damage bonuses are a stable damage rider field.

fields.comment: Flat damage bonuses are a stable damage rider field. It maps to `effects[].damage.flat`. It is populated from the structured markdown label `Damage Flat`. Purpose: effects[].damage.flat exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about this mechanic. Populate it from the structured markdown field `Damage Flat`, after that field has been checked against canonical prose. It maps to runtime JSON path `effects[].damage.flat`. The value type is `number`. This is optional or conditional in the runtime shape. Omit or leave empty only when this runtime/template layer intentionally treats the field as optional.
